forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of drizzle. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 53. West southwest wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

forecast.name: Sunday
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of drizzle before 2pm. Mostly sunny. High near 62, with temperatures falling to around 60 in the afternoon. West wind 7 to 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

weather_report:
In the heart of Downtown San Francisco, the early morning hours bring with them a gentle whisper of drizzle, barely enough to dampen the streets but sufficient to enshroud the city in a cool, damp embrace. As the sun begins to peek tentatively from behind scattered clouds, the murkiness of the night gives way to an overcast sky, hinting at the possibility of a mostly sunny afternoon. The day feels crisp and invigorating, ideal for those who enjoy a brisk stroll along the waterfront or perhaps a quiet moment spent in one of the city's cozy cafes.

While the anticipated high temperature will hover around a pleasant 62 degrees, the lingering marine layer may obscure some of the more distant views, particularly towards the Golden Gate. Given the cool wind that plays along the streets, layering is advisable: a light jacket or cardigan will complement a simple outfit comfortably throughout the day. As the drizzle dissipates by midday, one might find themselves drawn to the abundant parks and winding trails, where the fresh scent of the ocean mingles with flowering greenery, creating an opportunity to appreciate nature's beauty amidst the urban tapestry.
